Weekly Product Sync - Q1 Planning

Attendees
Alice Johnson
Bob Smith
Carol Davis
David Lee

Summary
The team discussed Q1 planning priorities. The main focus will be on shipping the new dashboard and improving API performance. Alice shared metrics showing a 15% improvement in page load times from the recent optimization work.

Key Discussion Points
- Dashboard redesign timeline: targeting end of February
- API performance: 15% improvement already achieved, aiming for 30%
- Customer feedback integration into the roadmap
- Budget allocation for Q1 infrastructure upgrades

Decisions Made
- Proceed with dashboard redesign using the new component library
- Allocate additional resources to API performance team
- Schedule customer feedback sessions for next sprint

Action Items
- Alice: Finalize dashboard mockups by Friday
- Bob: Prepare API performance benchmark report
- Carol: Set up customer feedback sessions
- David: Update Q1 roadmap document

Next Steps
- Review dashboard mockups in Thursday design review
- Share Q1 roadmap with stakeholders by end of week
